name: Samsung 65" Class S90C OLED 4K Smart TV (2023)
description: Experience stunning OLED picture quality with the Samsung S90C. Its Neural Quantum Processor 4K with AI Upscaling delivers brilliant detail, while Dolby Atmos and Object Tracking Sound Lite provide immersive audio. LaserSlim design fits beautifully in any room.
features: OLED self-lit pixels for perfect blacks and infinite contrast
Neural Quantum Processor 4K with AI Upscaling
Dolby Atmos and Object Tracking Sound Lite
Motion Xcelerator 144Hz for ultra-smooth gaming
SmartThings hub built-in for smart home control

name: LG 55" Class C3 OLED evo 4K Smart TV (2023)
description: The LG C3 OLED evo delivers breathtaking picture quality powered by the a9 Gen6 AI Processor 4K. Self-lit OLED pixels create perfect blacks, vivid colors, and an ultra-wide viewing angle. With four HDMI 2.1 ports and a 120Hz refresh rate, it's a top pick for gaming.
features: OLED evo with Brightness Booster for enhanced luminance
a9 Gen6 AI Processor 4K for intelligent optimization
Dolby Vision, Dolby Atmos, and Filmmaker Mode
4 HDMI 2.1 ports with 4K 120Hz, VRR, and ALLM
webOS 23 with built-in voice assistants

name: Sony 75" Class X90L Full Array LED 4K Smart Google TV (2023)
description: The Sony X90L delivers exceptional 4K HDR picture quality with Full Array LED and XR Contrast Booster 10. Powered by the Cognitive Processor XR, it intelligently enhances every scene for a lifelike viewing experience. Google TV provides seamless streaming and smart home integration.
features: Cognitive Processor XR for lifelike picture and sound
Full Array LED with XR Contrast Booster 10
XR Triluminos Pro for wide color spectrum
Google TV with hands-free voice control
Perfect for PlayStation 5 with Auto HDR Tone Mapping

name: TCL 65" Class S4 S-Class 4K UHD HDR LED Smart TV with Google TV
description: Get big-screen entertainment at an incredible value with the TCL 65" S4. This 4K UHD smart TV features HDR support, DTS Virtual:X audio, and Google TV for easy access to all your favorite streaming apps. AIPQ Engine delivers optimized picture quality at this price point.
features: 4K UHD resolution with HDR for vibrant picture quality
AIPQ Engine for intelligent scene optimization
Google TV with built-in Chromecast and voice remote
DTS Virtual:X for immersive surround sound
3 HDMI inputs and dual-band Wi-Fi

name: Hisense 75" Class U8K Mini-LED ULED 4K Smart TV (2023)
description: The Hisense U8K delivers premium picture performance with Mini-LED backlighting and up to 1500 nits of peak brightness. Its Hi-View Engine chipset powers Quantum Dot color and full array local dimming for outstanding contrast. With a 144Hz refresh rate, it excels for gaming and sports.
features: Mini-LED backlighting with 500+ local dimming zones
Quantum Dot Wide Color Gamut technology
Up to 1500 nits peak brightness for stunning HDR
144Hz Game Mode Pro with VRR and ALLM
Google TV with Dolby Vision IQ and Dolby Atmos

name: Samsung 50" Class CU7000 Crystal UHD 4K Smart TV (2023)
description: The Samsung CU7000 brings Crystal UHD 4K resolution and PurColor technology to your living room at an affordable price. Its Crystal Processor 4K optimizes every scene for clear, detailed picture quality. Samsung Smart TV with the Tizen platform lets you stream all your favorites effortlessly.
features: Crystal Processor 4K for optimized picture quality
PurColor technology for a wide range of colors
Motion Xcelerator for smooth action scenes
Samsung Smart TV with Universal Guide
Q-Symphony compatible for TV and soundbar harmony

name: LG 77" Class G3 OLED evo Gallery Edition 4K Smart TV (2023)
description: The LG G3 is the pinnacle of OLED technology, featuring Brightness Booster Max for up to 70% brighter images than conventional OLEDs. The a9 Gen6 AI Processor 4K intelligently adjusts picture and sound to perfection. Its one-wall design with a flush-mount bracket delivers a stunning gallery aesthetic.
features: OLED evo with Brightness Booster Max for unmatched brightness
a9 Gen6 AI Processor 4K with AI Picture and Sound Pro
One Wall Design with included flush-mount bracket
Dolby Vision, Dolby Atmos, and IMAX Enhanced
4 HDMI 2.1 ports with 4K 120Hz and G-Sync Compatible

name: Vizio 55" Class M-Series Quantum 4K HDR Smart TV
description: The Vizio M-Series Quantum delivers vibrant 4K HDR picture quality with Quantum Color technology and up to 30 local dimming zones. Its IQ Active Processor optimizes every scene for rich detail and contrast. SmartCast with built-in Chromecast, Apple AirPlay 2, and free channels make streaming simple.
features: Quantum Color for vivid, lifelike colors
Full Array LED backlight with up to 30 local dimming zones
Dolby Vision HDR and HDR10+ support
SmartCast with Chromecast, AirPlay 2, and 250+ free channels
AMD FreeSync for responsive gaming

name: Sony 65" Class A80L BRAVIA XR OLED 4K Smart Google TV (2023)
description: The Sony A80L OLED is powered by the Cognitive Processor XR, which understands how humans see and hear to deliver incredibly natural picture quality. With XR OLED Contrast Pro and XR Triluminos Pro, every frame is rendered with striking realism. Acoustic Surface Audio+ turns the screen itself into a speaker.
features: Cognitive Processor XR for human-like intelligence
XR OLED Contrast Pro for deep blacks and bright highlights
Acoustic Surface Audio+ with screen-as-speaker technology
Google TV with 700+ free streaming channels
BRAVIA CAM support for gesture control and video chat

name: TCL 55" Class QM8 QLED 4K Mini-LED Smart TV with Google TV
description: The TCL QM8 is a powerhouse Mini-LED TV with up to 2000 nits of peak brightness and 1000+ local dimming zones. Quantum Dot technology delivers over a billion colors, while the 120Hz panel with Game Accelerator 240 ensures buttery-smooth motion. Outstanding value for premium picture performance.
features: Mini-LED backlight with 1000+ local dimming zones
Quantum Dot technology with up to 2000 nits peak brightness
120Hz panel with Game Accelerator 240
Dolby Vision IQ, Dolby Atmos, and IMAX Enhanced
Google TV with hands-free voice control

name: Samsung HW-Q990C 11.1.4ch Soundbar with Wireless Dolby Atmos
description: The Samsung HW-Q990C is a premium 11.1.4-channel soundbar system with wireless subwoofer and rear speakers for true Dolby Atmos and DTS:X surround sound. Its 22 speakers deliver room-filling audio with upfiring channels for overhead effects. Q-Symphony technology syncs with compatible Samsung TVs for even more immersive sound.
features: 11.1.4 channel system with 22 speakers total
Dolby Atmos and DTS:X for immersive 3D audio
Wireless subwoofer and rear surround speakers included
Q-Symphony syncs with Samsung TV speakers
SpaceFit Sound+ auto-calibrates to your room

name: Sony HT-A7000 7.1.2ch Dolby Atmos Soundbar
description: The Sony HT-A7000 is a premium single-bar solution with 7.1.2 channels, including two upfiring speakers for Dolby Atmos height effects. Sony's Vertical Surround Engine and S-Force PRO Front Surround create an enveloping sound field from a single unit. Supports HDMI eARC, Bluetooth, Chromecast, and Spotify Connect.
features: 7.1.2ch with built-in subwoofers and upfiring drivers
Dolby Atmos and DTS:X for overhead audio effects
Vertical Surround Engine and S-Force PRO Front Surround
HDMI eARC, Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, Chromecast built-in
Expandable with optional wireless subwoofer and rear speakers

name: Vizio M-Series 5.1 Premium Sound Bar with Dolby Atmos
description: The Vizio M-Series 5.1 sound bar system includes a wireless subwoofer and satellite speakers for real surround sound at an accessible price. With Dolby Atmos and DTS:X support, it delivers height effects and three-dimensional audio. Bluetooth streaming and HDMI eARC make setup effortless.
features: 5.1 channel system with wireless subwoofer and satellites
Dolby Atmos and DTS:X for 3D immersive audio
11 high-performance speakers across the system
HDMI eARC and Bluetooth 5.0 connectivity
Voice assistant compatible with Alexa and Google Assistant

name: LG SP7Y 5.1 Channel High-Res Audio Sound Bar with DTS Virtual:X
description: The LG SP7Y delivers room-filling 5.1 channel sound with a wireless subwoofer for deep, powerful bass. DTS Virtual:X creates an immersive surround sound experience without rear speakers. Meridian audio tuning and Hi-Res Audio support ensure premium sound quality for music and movies alike.
features: 5.1 channel sound with wireless subwoofer
DTS Virtual:X and Dolby Digital for immersive audio
Meridian audio technology for premium tuning
Hi-Res Audio certified (24bit/96kHz)
AI Sound Pro for intelligent sound optimization

name: Roku Streaming Stick 4K (2022) Streaming Device
description: The Roku Streaming Stick 4K delivers cinematic 4K HDR streaming in a portable, plug-and-play form factor. Its long-range Wi-Fi receiver provides a fast, smooth streaming experience even in rooms far from your router. Access thousands of free and paid channels with the simple, intuitive Roku interface.
features: 4K, HDR10+, and Dolby Vision streaming
Long-range Wi-Fi for faster, stronger connection
Voice remote with TV controls for power and volume
Thousands of free and paid streaming channels
Portable design plugs directly into HDMI port

name: Roku Ultra (2022) 4K Streaming Device with Voice Remote Pro
description: The Roku Ultra is Roku's most powerful streaming device, featuring 4K Dolby Vision, Dolby Atmos, and blazing-fast performance. It includes the premium Voice Remote Pro with a rechargeable battery, hands-free voice control, and a lost remote finder. Ethernet and USB ports ensure versatile connectivity.
features: 4K streaming with Dolby Vision and Dolby Atmos support
Voice Remote Pro with rechargeable battery and hands-free voice
Ethernet port for wired internet connection
USB port for local media playback
Lost Remote Finder with built-in speaker on remote

name: Roku Express 4K+ Streaming Device with Smooth Wi-Fi
description: The Roku Express 4K+ is the easiest way to start streaming in brilliant 4K picture quality at an unbeatable price. Dual-band MIMO wireless delivers a fast, smooth streaming experience, and the simple setup takes just minutes. Enjoy free TV, live news, sports, movies, and more across thousands of channels.
features: 4K UHD, HDR10, and HDR10+ streaming support
Dual-band MIMO Wi-Fi for smooth streaming
Simple remote with shortcut buttons for popular apps
Free Roku TV with 350+ live linear TV channels
Works with Alexa, Google Assistant, and Apple AirPlay

name: Epson Home Cinema 2350 3LCD 1080p Smart Streaming Projector
description: The Epson Home Cinema 2350 delivers stunning Full HD 1080p projection up to 150" with built-in Android TV streaming. Its 3LCD technology produces vibrant, color-accurate images with 2,800 lumens of brightness for use even in moderately lit rooms. Built-in Chromecast and streaming apps eliminate the need for external devices.
features: Full HD 1080p with 2,800 lumens brightness
3LCD technology for vivid, balanced color
Built-in Android TV with Chromecast and streaming apps
Screen size up to 150" diagonal
Lens shift, keystone correction, and 1.6x zoom

name: Epson EpiqVision Ultra LS800 4K PRO-UHD Ultra Short Throw Laser Projector
description: The Epson LS800 is an ultra short throw laser projector that sits just inches from the wall to produce a massive 150" 4K PRO-UHD image. With 4,000 lumens of brightness and a laser light source, it delivers vibrant images in any lighting condition. Built-in Android TV and a premium Yamaha-tuned speaker system make it a true all-in-one home theater solution.
features: 4K PRO-UHD resolution with 4,000 lumens laser brightness
Ultra short throw: place inches from the wall for up to 150"
Yamaha-tuned integrated 2.1 speaker system with built-in subwoofer
Built-in Android TV with Chromecast and streaming apps
Laser light source rated up to 20,000 hours

name: Roku Streambar Pro 4K HDR Streaming Device and Premium Soundbar
description: The Roku Streambar Pro combines a powerful 4K HDR streaming player with a premium soundbar in a single compact device. Four internal speakers deliver room-filling sound with Dolby Audio and speech clarity modes. It replaces both a streaming stick and a basic soundbar, simplifying your entertainment setup.
features: 4K HDR streaming with Dolby Vision support
Built-in premium soundbar with four speakers
Voice Remote Pro with rechargeable battery and hands-free voice
Dolby Audio, DTS Digital Surround, and speech clarity mode
Expandable to wireless surround with Roku speakers
